mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot ( application_id, portfolio_id, email, category, title, summary, content, work_start_at, work_end_at, is_public, banner_file_id, source_created_at, source_updated_at, sort_order, created_at ) SELECT #{applicationId}, p.portfolio_id, p.email, p.category, p.title, p.summary, p.content, p.work_start_at, p.work_end_at, p.is_public, p.banner_file_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, #{sortOrder}, NOW() FROM portfolio p WHERE p.portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND p.is_deleted = 0

INSERT INTO recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot_file ( snapshot_id, file_id, file_role, user_email, company_email, sys_name, ori_name, parent_type, parent_id, upload_path, file_size, source_created_at, sort_order, created_at ) SELECT ps.snapshot_id, f.file_id, CASE WHEN f.file_id = p.banner_file_id THEN 'BANNER' ELSE 'ATTACHMENT' END, f.user_email, f.company_email, f.sys_name, f.ori_name, f.parent_type, f.parent_id, f.upload_path, f.file_size, f.created_at, CASE WHEN f.file_id = p.banner_file_id THEN 0 ELSE f.file_id END, NOW() FROM recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot ps INNER JOIN portfolio p ON p.portfolio_id = ps.portfolio_id INNER JOIN file f ON f.file_id = p.banner_file_id OR ( f.parent_type = 'PORTFOLIO_FILE' AND f.parent_id = p.portfolio_id ) WHERE ps.application_id = #{applicationId} AND ps.portfolio_id = #{portfolioId}
mapper.select: SELECT portfolio_id, title, summary, category, banner_file_id, is_public FROM recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT portfolio_id, email, category, title, summary, content, work_start_at, work_end_at, is_public, banner_file_id, source_created_at, source_updated_at FROM recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND portfolio_id = #{portfolioId}

SELECT sf.file_id, sf.user_email, sf.company_email, sf.sys_name, sf.ori_name, sf.parent_type, sf.parent_id, sf.upload_path, sf.source_created_at AS created_at, sf.file_size FROM recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot_file sf INNER JOIN recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot ps ON ps.snapshot_id = sf.snapshot_id WHERE ps.application_id = #{applicationId} AND ps.portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND sf.file_role = 'ATTACHMENT' ORDER BY sf.sort_order ASC

SELECT file_id FROM recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot_file sf INNER JOIN recruitment_application_portfolio_snapshot ps ON ps.snapshot_id = sf.snapshot_id WHERE ps.application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY ps.sort_order ASC, sf.sort_order ASC
